channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Japan Strengthens Support for the Philippines in Disaster Response and Environmental Recovery
item.description: The Japanese government has reiterated its support for the Philippines in addressing disasters and emergencies. According to the Embassy of Japan in the Philippines, Tokyo is committed to closer coord...

item.title: PM forms committee to resolve CNG shortage in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
item.description: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa is facing a serious CNG shortage since April, causing hardship for citizens and affecting local business and economic activity. On May 19, 2026, KP Governor Faisal Karim Kundi infor...

item.title: UP Cebu Alumnus Vince Dingding Dies in Negros Armed Encounter
item.description: Vince Francis Dingding, a former student leader and computer science graduate from University of the Philippines Cebu, was killed during a clash between military forces and rebels in Cauayan, Negros O...

item.title: Amazon Introduces AI-Generated Podcasts on Alexa+ with Custom Topics
item.description: Amazon has expanded its Alexa+ platform by introducing AI-generated podcasts. Users can now request personalized audio explainers on virtually any topic, with two synthetic co-hosts leading the discus...

item.title: BRICS Foreign Ministers Express Support for Independent Palestine
item.description: In a significant development last week, the BRICS foreign ministers met in New Delhi and expressed their support for an independent Palestinian state. Despite longstanding internal differences, the me...

item.title: Desmond Elliot Denies Orchestrating Obasa’s Impeachment
item.description: Desmond Elliot, wey dey represent Surulere I for Lagos State House of Assembly, don yan say e no get hand for the impeachment wey happen for Speaker Mudashiru Obasa last year. The actor-turned-politic...

item.title: Debate over defining antisemitism in Australia
item.description: A series of letters published in the Sydney Morning Herald discusses the ongoing debate surrounding the adoption of the International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance’s (IHRA) definition of antisemitism...

item.title: Economic Impact of Billy Bishop Airport Expansion Remains Unverified
item.description: The Ontario government has claimed that expanding Toronto's Billy Bishop Airport to accommodate jets could contribute up to $8.5 billion annually to the economy by 2050. However, no completed economic...

item.title: Three Pretoria West SAPS officers granted bail in ongoing extortion investigation
item.description: Three officers from the Pretoria West Police Station are facing charges of corruption and extortion after allegedly attempting to solicit money from two Tshwane Metro Police officers. Constable Lionel...

item.title: Using Real Estate Strategically to Support Long-Term Family Wealth
item.description: Real estate remains a cornerstone for building long-term wealth among high-net-worth Canadian families. Beyond owning a primary residence or family cottage, affluent individuals often acquire multiple...

item.title: Australian parents finding it harder to help adult children enter the property market
item.description: Australian parents and grandparents are finding it increasingly difficult to provide financial assistance to their adult children looking to buy their first home, as soaring property prices continue t...

item.title: TTAP plans nationwide protests demanding action on inflation, petrol prices, and political prisoners
item.description: Islamabad: Tehreek Tahaffuz Aiyeen-e-Pakistan (TTAP) has announced nationwide protests on Friday to raise voice against rising inflation, sudden increases in petroleum prices, and the continued detent...

item.title: Nigerian Graduate Student Killed in Ohio Days Before MBA Graduation
item.description: The Nigerian sports community don enter serious mourning after the tragic killing of Oluwabukola Pereira, a 30-year-old athlete and graduate student, in the United States. Pereira was reportedly shot ...

item.title: Three Variations of Hearty Baked Potatoes
item.description: This article from CTV Your Morning presents three creative recipes for extra-loaded baked potatoes, offering a variety of ways to enjoy this classic comfort food. The article provides step-by-step gui...

item.title: Basiru Clarifies Wike Did Not Influence Rivers APC Primaries
item.description: Senator Ajibola Basiru, the National Secretary of APC, don clear say Minister of FCT, Nyesom Wike, no get hand for who win the party primaries for Rivers State. For interview wey e give Arise News, Ba...

item.title: Understanding Childhood Stunting: Gut Health, Environment and Nutrition Must Work Together
item.description: Even though supermarket plenty and food dey available for South Africa and many other places, children still dey suffer from stunted growth. This article talk say food alone no go solve di problem. Re...

item.title: Court sentences Umar Hayat to death in Sana Yousaf murder case
item.description: ISLAMABAD: In a major development in the tragic case of social media influencer Sana Yousaf, a local Islamabad court has handed down the death penalty to Umar Hayat, the main accused in her murder. Th...

item.title: Major Health, Social, and Political Developments Across Africa
item.description: On 19th May 2026, several significant events unfolded across Africa. In the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an Ebola outbreak caused by the Bundibugyo virus has resulted in at least 131 deaths, with...

item.title: DILG Confirms No Evidence of Attack on Senate
item.description: The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) has clarified that, based on all available evidence, there was no attack on the Philippine Senate. DILG Chief emphasized that authorities hav...

item.title: Adani Group shares gain following US dropping charges against Gautam Adani
item.description: The Adani Group witnessed a significant surge in its stock prices after the United States authorities dropped all charges against its chairman, Gautam Adani. Investors responded positively to this dev...
